explanation: Reordered the quiet flag to appear before the /i flag, which is functionally equivalent and may bypass detection relying on specific argument order.
Inserted extra space after the /q flag and before the /i flag, which may bypass detection that relies on strict spacing patterns.
Moved the /quiet flag to the end of the command line, which is still valid and may evade detection that looks for /quiet immediately after /i.
Used the short form of the quiet flag (-q) instead of /quiet, which is functionally equivalent and may bypass detection expecting the long form.
Used /qn instead of /quiet, which is a valid alternative flag for quiet installation and may bypass detection looking for /quiet.
